---
title: "Research"
pagetitle: "Research"
subtitle: "Articles, working papers, and a book. Filter by project, or scroll chronologically."
listing:
  id: pubs
  contents:
    - "news/[0-9]*.qmd"
    - "working-papers/[0-9]*.qmd"
  template: _templates/pub-list.ejs
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 100
  categories: false
  feed: false
  fields: [title, date, categories, authors, venue, pub_project, doi, pdf, preprint, arxiv, code, data, materials, prereg, supplement, slides, project_page, book, publisher_url, excerpt_url, buy_url, preview_url, cite_key]
---

{{< include _includes/pub-filter.html >}}

::: {#pubs}
:::
